subcodes.first_line: O my Lord, my Lord! Praise be unto Thee for that Thy mercy hath preceded all else, Thy bounties have been showered forth in abundance, Thy Word hath been perfected, and Thy wisdom made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مولای مولای لک الحمد بما سبقت رحمتک و سبغت نعمتک و تمت کلمتک و ظهرت حکمتک
subcodes.subjects: @attaining the life of the spirit, @apocalyptic imagery, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @chastisement and requital, @spiritual transformation
